info.title: ITIS Web Services API
info.description: The Integrated Taxonomic Information System (ITIS) Web Services provide access to the ITIS taxonomic database. Includes search functions, TSN-based data retrieval, hierarchy navigation, and metadata/reference data endpoints. All endpoints are read-only GET requests with no authentication required.

get.description: Search by common name, scientific name, or TSN. Returns matching results with TSNs.
Paginated search by common name, scientific name, or TSN.
Returns the count of matches for a search term.
Returns matches where the common name contains the search term.
Returns matches where the common name begins with the search term.
Returns matches where the common name ends with the search term.
Returns matches where the scientific name contains the search term.
Returns scientific name, common names, and usage information for a search term.

get.summary: Get ITIS terms from common name
get.description: Returns ITIS terms matching a common name search.

get.summary: Get ITIS terms from scientific name
get.description: Returns ITIS terms matching a scientific name search.
Returns TSNs with vernacular names in the specified language.
Returns the complete ITIS record for a TSN. This operation may be time-consuming.
Returns the scientific name and its component parts for a TSN.
Returns a list of common names for a TSN.
Returns accepted names for the TSN.
Returns synonym names for the TSN.

get.summary: Get taxonomic rank name from TSN
get.description: Returns the kingdom and rank information for a TSN.
Returns the kingdom name for a TSN.
Returns the parent TSN for the given TSN.
Returns usage information (accepted/not accepted) for a TSN.
Returns geographic division information for a TSN.
Returns the complete taxonomic hierarchy for a TSN including TSNs, rank names, and scientific names.
Returns the immediate children in the hierarchy below the given TSN.
Returns the parent taxon in the hierarchy above the given TSN.
Returns all kingdom names with their IDs and TSNs.
Returns all taxonomic rank names with kingdom names and rank IDs.
Returns all languages available in the vernacular table.
Returns all available geographic division values.
Returns the latest database revision date.
Returns a description of the web service and the ITIS database.

schema.description: Web service and ITIS database description.

SearchResultList.description: List of search results with match type and TSN.

nameUsage.description: Usage status (accepted, not accepted, valid, invalid).

FullRecord.description: Complete ITIS record for a TSN.

taxonUsageRating.description: Usage rating (accepted, not accepted, valid, invalid).

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Search for taxa by name, common name, or keyword

tags.name: TSN Data
